title: (Bullish Signal) WYNN, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling WYNN's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 45 similar cases where WYNN's MACD histogram became positive, and 35 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 78%. Current price $131.04 crossed the support line at $131.84 and is trading between $131.84 support and $124.24 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/08/21 - 04/08/21, the price experienced a -0.19% Downtrend, while the week of 03/31/21 - 04/08/21 shows a +6% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/odga77u316s61.png?width=1525&format=png&auto=webp&s=0864242678e2fd165dbd017284640bfd524bcc3b

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on April 06, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on WYNN as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 69 of 84 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for WYNN just turned positive on April 08, 2021. Looking at past instances where WYNN's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 35 of 45 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 78%.

WYNN moved above its 50-day Moving Average on February 03, 2021 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 50-day Moving Average for WYNN moved above the 200-day moving average on December 02, 2020. This could be a long-term bullish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an upward trend.

Following a +6.46% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where WYNN advanced for three days, in 244 of 307 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

WYNN may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 211 of 286 cases where WYNN Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 74%.
